uplink.description: TER frame (0x04): 3 records (temp/humidity/pressure) + battery%, newest at top level, older two in history
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds TER frame. Inputs hand-built to the MCF88 TER wire format (date/temp x100 signed/humidity x2/pressure x100 hPa); expected.data authored here. Wire values cross-checked by running reference/upstream-codec.js, whose flat output reports the newest record as temperature=22.75 humidity=44.00 pressure=1011.60 battery=87.

uplink.description: TER frame (0x04) with sub-zero outdoor temperatures (two's-complement) + low battery
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds TER frame exercising negative temperatures. Wire values cross-checked by running reference/upstream-codec.js: newest record temperature=-1.50 humidity=77.00 pressure=1000.00 battery=12.

uplink.description: Unsupported frame id (not the 0x04 TER frame) -> error
uplink._note: Synthetic. Upstream returns the generic 'Error on decoding payload' for any non-handled id; we author a specific message naming the id. This device only emits the 0x04 TER frame.
